seoTitle: Tumby Bay vs Tungkillo — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tumby Bay and Tungkillo. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tumby Bay vs Tungkillo: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tumby Bay and Tungkillo.
heading: Tumby Bay vs Tungkillo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tumby Bay, South Australia and Tungkillo, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tungkillo has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Tumby Bay (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tumby Bay or Tungkillo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tumby Bay has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Tungkillo scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tumby Bay scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Tungkillo scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tumby Bay or Tungkillo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tungkillo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
